$description: Canonical radius — HAND-AUTHORED (Phase 4). radius.* = static Figma-kit steps (kit parity, fixed). radius.ui.* = the calc() scale components render with, derived at runtime from --radius (brand base lives in tokens/theme/<brand>.radius). Not regenerated by migrate.

xs.$description: Static Figma-kit step — NOT what components render. Kept for parity with the kit export; use radius.ui.* for component work.

sm.$description: Static Figma-kit step — NOT what components render. Kept for parity with the kit export; use radius.ui.* for component work.

md.$description: Static Figma-kit step — NOT what components render. Kept for parity with the kit export; use radius.ui.* for component work.

lg.$description: Static Figma-kit step — NOT what components render. Kept for parity with the kit export; use radius.ui.* for component work.

xl.$description: Static Figma-kit step — NOT what components render. Kept for parity with the kit export; use radius.ui.* for component work.

2xl.$description: Static Figma-kit step — NOT what components render. Kept for parity with the kit export; use radius.ui.* for component work.

3xl.$description: Static Figma-kit step — NOT what components render. Kept for parity with the kit export; use radius.ui.* for component work.

4xl.$description: Static Figma-kit step — NOT what components render. Kept for parity with the kit export; use radius.ui.* for component work.

none.$description: Static Figma-kit step — NOT what components render. Kept for parity with the kit export; use radius.ui.* for component work.

full.$description: Static Figma-kit step — NOT what components render. Kept for parity with the kit export; use radius.ui.* for component work.

sm.$description: rounded-sm = 4px at the current --radius (0.75rem). Offsets, not ratios: a ratio lands off the 4px grid (0.75 × 12 = 9).

md.$description: rounded-md = 8px at the current --radius (0.75rem). Offsets, not ratios: a ratio lands off the 4px grid (0.75 × 12 = 9).

lg.$description: rounded-lg = 12px at the current --radius (0.75rem). Offsets, not ratios: a ratio lands off the 4px grid (0.75 × 12 = 9).

xl.$description: rounded-xl = 16px at the current --radius (0.75rem). Offsets, not ratios: a ratio lands off the 4px grid (0.75 × 12 = 9).

2xl.$description: rounded-2xl = 24px at the current --radius (0.75rem). Offsets, not ratios: a ratio lands off the 4px grid (0.75 × 12 = 9).

3xl.$description: rounded-3xl = 32px at the current --radius (0.75rem). Offsets, not ratios: a ratio lands off the 4px grid (0.75 × 12 = 9).

4xl.$description: rounded-4xl = 40px at the current --radius (0.75rem). Offsets, not ratios: a ratio lands off the 4px grid (0.75 × 12 = 9).
